notes: Running list of speakers, brand-side attendees, and activating companies for Cannes Lions 2026 (June 22-26). Initial seed from CYLNDR Cannes 2026 Project Tracker uploaded 2026-05-08. Updated daily by scheduled task. ICP target: VP/Director Marketing (or equivalent) at DTC brands, Series B/C scale-ups, growth-stage challenger brands, mid-market under ~$500M revenue. Expanded fit titles include: Head of Brand, Head of Growth, Head of Content, Head of Social, Head of Ecommerce, Head of Production, Head of Design, Content Production lead; CMO at challenger brands under ~$300M; CEO/Founder at DTC brands under ~$100M with <Series C. In-house creative/production studio leaders (e.g., Head of [Studio Name], Managing Director In-House Agency, Creative Studio Director) are ICP-fit when their company runs a dedicated branded content or production operation. Priority sectors: beauty, functional F&B/CPG, fitness/recovery, gaming, creator-led brands, social commerce-first brands.
